description: Create a 'Quad-View' radiological summary of the loaded CT Cranium dataset. Generate a 3D surface of the skull using the standard Bone threshold and set the 3D visualization panel background to white. Configure the layout to the standard 4-panel view (Axial, Sagittal, Coronal, and 3D) with the slice views centered on anatomical structures. Export a screenshot of the full interface to /home/ga/Documents/radiology_summary.png.
